summary: SINGLE_FOCUS: equilateral triangle with 3 color-coded corner dots (BLUE, RED, GREEN) and number labels. Transform sequence enumerates all 6 elements of S_3 — identity, r (rotate 120°), r² (240°), and three reflections s, rs, r²s — with the current permutation shown as a cycle on the right. Ends with |S_3| = 3! = 6.
